title: Kindness Delivery
description: A kindness post office where kids notice how others may feel, choose caring deliveries, and receive nudges to try those acts in real life.
learningGoals: Notice clues about how another person may feel
Practice choosing generous and helpful responses
Carry playful kindness ideas into real-world habits
interactionModel: observe-journal presents a recipient or secret mission, then the child taps a large deliverable sticker to add a heart-worthy act to the journal
feedbackModel: Every caring choice is accepted with warm speech and cheerful pop, whoosh, and sparkle SFX; each spoken response ends with an off-tablet real-world nudge.

modes.title: Make a Delivery
modes.skill: notice feelings and choose a caring response

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
